address_family.description: The IP address family (IPv4 or IPv6) of the prefix list.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the prefix list.

entries.description: A set of CIDR block entries and their descriptions in the prefix list.

id.description: The unique identifier of the prefix list.

max_entries.description: The maximum number of entries allowed in the prefix list.

name.description: The name of the prefix list.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the prefix list.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the prefix list.

version.description: The current version number of the prefix list.
